message:
feat(conformance): add FSCI-P2C-003 optimization conformance packet with E2E scenarios

Implement the optimize_core conformance packet covering minimize and
root-finding operations with differential, metamorphic, and adversarial
test categories:

Conformance harness (lib.rs ~550 lines):
- Add OptimizeMinObjective (11 variants) and OptimizeRootObjective
  (6 variants) enums for objective function dispatch
- Add OptimizeCase (Minimize/Root), OptimizeExpectedOutcome, and
  OptimizePacketFixture types
- Implement run_optimize_packet() and run_differential_optimize()
  with contract-based tolerance resolution via ContractTable/OnceLock
- Register PacketFamily::Optimize in run_all_packets dispatch
- Tests with category quota assertions (>=15 differential, >=6
  metamorphic, >=8 adversarial)

E2E scenarios (e2e_optimize.rs, 548 lines, 8 tests):
- Happy path BFGS on Rosenbrock with convergence trace
- Multi-algorithm comparison (BFGS vs CG vs Powell)
- Root-finding pipeline (brentq + bisect cross-agreement)
- CG trace semantics (monotonic improvement, finite grads)
- Strict vs Hardened mode on NaN-barrier objective
- Powell on non-differentiable |x| cusp
- Callback workflow with immediate-stop verification
- 64-dimensional stress test under 15s budget
- Forensic JSON bundles written to artifacts/P2C-003/e2e/runs/

Fixture: FSCI-P2C-003_optimize_core.json with golden-value cases.
Fix clippy warnings in evidence_p2c002.rs (unused vars, closure borrow).
Add fsci-opt dependency to fsci-conformance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,556 @@
+{

+  "family": "optimize_core",

+      "case_id": "adv_minimize_empty_x0",
+      "category": "adversarial",
+      "mode": "Strict",
+      "method": "Bfgs",
+      "objective": "sphere2",

+      "expected": {

+        "error": "x0 must be a finite 1-D vector with at least one element"

+    {

+      "case_id": "adv_root_invalid_xtol",

+      "expected": {
+        "kind": "minimize_status",
+        "status": "MaxEvaluations",
+        "success": false
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "operation": "root",
+      "case_id": "adv_root_sign_change_violation",
+      "category": "adversarial",
+      "mode": "Strict",
+      "method": "Brentq",
+      "objective": "linear_shift03",
+      "bracket": [0.4, 0.9],
+      "expected": {
+        "kind": "error",
+        "error": "bracketing methods require f(a) and f(b) to have opposite signs"
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "operation": "root",
+      "case_id": "adv_root_nan_strict",
+      "category": "adversarial",
+      "mode": "Strict",
+      "method": "Bisect",
+      "objective": "nan_branch",
+      "bracket": [0.1, 0.9],
+      "expected": {
+        "kind": "error",
+        "error": "root function returned non-finite value"
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "operation": "root",
+      "case_id": "adv_root_nan_hardened",
+      "category": "adversarial",
+      "mode": "Hardened",
+      "method": "Bisect",
+      "objective": "nan_branch",
+      "bracket": [0.1, 0.9],
+      "expected": {
+        "kind": "error",
+        "error": "hardened mode rejects non-finite function values"
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "operation": "root",
+      "case_id": "adv_root_maxiter_budget",
+      "category": "adversarial",
+      "mode": "Strict",
+      "method": "Bisect",
+      "objective": "linear_shift03",
+      "bracket": [0.0, 1.0],
+      "xtol": 1e-18,
+      "rtol": 1e-18,
+      "maxiter": 1,
+      "expected": {
+        "kind": "root_status",
+        "status": "MaxIterations",
+        "converged": false
+      }
+    }
+  ]
+}

@@ -13,6 +13,10 @@ This folder stores normalized oracle-vs-target fixtures for fsci-conformance.
   - `det`
   - `lstsq`
   - `pinv`
+- `FSCI-P2C-003_optimize_core.json`: optimize/root differential + metamorphic +
+  adversarial conformance cases for:
+  - `minimize` (`BFGS`, `CG`, `Powell`) on Rosenbrock/Ackley/Rastrigin + invariance quadratics
+  - `root_scalar` (`brentq`, `brenth`, `bisect`, `ridder`) with scalar root contracts
 - `artifacts/`: generated parity reports, RaptorQ sidecars, and decode-proof logs.
 
 Expected per-packet durable artifacts:
@@ -36,6 +40,8 @@ Each run writes forensic logs to:
 
 - `artifacts/FSCI-P2C-*/e2e/runs/{run_id}/{scenario_id}/events.jsonl`
 - `artifacts/FSCI-P2C-*/e2e/runs/{run_id}/{scenario_id}/summary.json`
+- `artifacts/P2C-003/e2e/runs/*.json` (optimize E2E forensic bundles emitted by
+  `tests/e2e_optimize.rs`)
 
 Run the orchestrator:
